title: SENIOR SERVICES - 211info
text: IMPACT NW SOUTHEAST MULTICULTURAL SENIOR CENTER SENIOR SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services to older adults such as information and assistance/referral, Senior Law Project, and AARP tax preparation assistance. 4610 SE Belmont Street Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and caregivers for older adults Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 721-6760 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 721-6760 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None for most programs DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Farsi, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Inner southeast Portland from the Willamette River to 82nd Avenue and from Burnside Street to the Clackamas County line (Multnomah County part of zip codes 97202, 97206, 97214, and 97215) SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm Services: Elder Law Specialized Information and Referral * Older Adult/Aging Issues Tax Preparation Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - IMPACT KINCARE TRANSPORTATION - TRANSPORTATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IMPACT NW SOUTHEAST MULTICULTURAL SENIOR CENTER
